Home

Webrings

Webrings are collections of sites, organised into a looping list that can be traversed in different directions. Webrings were created before the days of Google, when the only way to find new websites was from links on other websites. Their continued existence is an effort to keep the indie web alive.

  • Will's Webring

    A small group of game designers, mostly from the GMTK (Game Makers Toolkit) community. Run by my friend Will.
